item.title:
BenDinnery: Ben Dinnery @BenDinnery · 1min #EFC
The Toffees are unchanged…
#LFC
Arne Slot makes four changes from the UCL defe
item.description:
Ben Dinnery @BenDinnery · 1min #EFC
The Toffees are unchanged…
#LFC
Arne Slot makes four changes from the UCL defeat to PSG on Tuesday.
Andy Robertson, Curtis Jones, Mohamed Salah and Cody Gakpo all come in.
Hugo Ekitike could miss the remainder of the year following an Achilles rupture. 299

item.title:
TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 1min No Maguire. No Martinez. No Yoro and no De Ligt.
No problem.
Manchester
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 1min No Maguire. No Martinez. No Yoro and no De Ligt.
No problem.
Manchester United may have feared the worst when they were reduced to one recognised senior centre-back for their trip to Chelsea.
But after what Michael Carrick described as “short notice”, Ayden Heaven and Noussair Mostrar más 2 7 19 1 mil
